name: Crawler Log Folder
description: The Leetcode file system keeps a log each time some user performs a change folder operation. The operations are: "../" (move to parent folder), "./" (stay in current folder), "x/" (move to child folder named x). You start at the main folder. Given a list of logs, return the minimum number of operations needed to go back to the main folder after the log operations.
